timeline.title: Product Manager / Member of Technical Staff
timeline.summary: At Data Sutram, he supports the company's only B2B SaaS application and owns UX, design, product management, development, and testing across the product lifecycle.
timeline.spokenForm: At Data Sutram, he supports the company's only business to business software as a service application and owns U X, design, product management, development, and testing across the product lifecycle.

timeline.title: AI data platform / assistant work
timeline.summary: At CaaStle Technologies from October 2022 to April 2025, he led the creation of an AI data platform, built AI assistants, shipped natural-language data querying with Gemini and Slack, and won a company hackathon with a GPT-4 customer-service chatbot.
timeline.spokenForm: At CaaStle Technologies from October 2022 to April 2025, he led the creation of an A I data platform, built A I assistants, shipped natural language data querying with Gemini and Slack, and won a company hackathon with a G P T four customer service chatbot.

timeline.title: Product and growth
timeline.summary: At Bajaj Finserv Health from May 2022 to September 2022, he worked on organic growth and built systems that linked healthcare entities for diagnosis, test recommendations, and doctor discovery.
timeline.spokenForm: At Bajaj Finserv Health from May 2022 to September 2022, he worked on organic growth and built systems that linked healthcare entities for diagnosis, test recommendations, and doctor discovery.

flagshipProjects.title: Research Paper : Semantic Gravity
flagshipProjects.coreSummary: Semantic Gravity is Shailesh's strongest research signal: a mechanistic interpretability paper that explains why language models fail negative constraints and introduces semantic pressure as a predictor of those failures.
flagshipProjects.spokenCoreSummary: Semantic Gravity is Shailesh's strongest research signal: a mechanistic interpretability paper that explains why language models fail negative constraints and introduces semantic pressure as a predictor of those failures.
flagshipProjects.whyItMatters: It shows original AI research, careful experimentation, and the ability to turn a model-behavior problem into a publishable explanatory framework.
flagshipProjects.spokenWhyItMatters: It shows original AI research, careful experimentation, and the ability to turn a model behavior problem into a publishable explanatory framework.
flagshipProjects.pmAiAngle: It matters for both AI research and product judgment because it connects model behavior to practical failure modes that can affect user trust and system design.

flagshipProjects.title: Q-Commerce Demo: List to Cart
flagshipProjects.coreSummary: List to Cart is the clearest product-management proof point: a demo that generates a full grocery cart from a simple list of items.
flagshipProjects.spokenCoreSummary: List to Cart is the clearest product management proof point: a demo that generates a full grocery cart from a simple list of items.
flagshipProjects.whyItMatters: It shows product thinking, UX judgment, and the ability to turn an AI capability into a concrete workflow people can understand quickly.
flagshipProjects.spokenWhyItMatters: It shows product thinking, U X judgment, and the ability to turn an A I capability into a concrete workflow people can understand quickly.
flagshipProjects.pmAiAngle: It demonstrates user-facing AI product design rather than only research depth.

flagshipProjects.title: How a 7-Billion-Parameter AI Cannot Add
flagshipProjects.coreSummary: How a 7-Billion-Parameter AI Cannot Add is an interpretability project that uncovered a systematic length bias in large-number addition.
flagshipProjects.spokenCoreSummary: The seven billion parameter addition interpretability project uncovered a systematic length bias in large number addition.
flagshipProjects.whyItMatters: It shows the ability to inspect model behavior closely, spot a non-obvious failure pattern, and explain why the model sometimes appears to do better on harder examples.
flagshipProjects.spokenWhyItMatters: It shows the ability to inspect model behavior closely, spot a non obvious failure pattern, and explain why the model sometimes appears to do better on harder examples.
flagshipProjects.pmAiAngle: Together with Semantic Gravity, it proves serious model-behavior analysis rather than surface-level AI experimentation.
